steps.title: Define the needed action
steps.content: The sentence says higher prices had a counterintuitive effect: buyers who had not wanted old action figures entered the market because they expected profits. The blank must describe prices drawing out or calling forth new demand.

steps.title: Match the demand context
steps.content: A means fulfilling demand that already exists. B and C describe taking advantage of something, which would fit buyers' actions rather than the effect of prices on demand. The needed word means generating or drawing out the demand. The answer is D.
